---
name: Bug Report
about: Something isn't working as expected
labels: bug
---

## Description

A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Tap '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behaviour

What actually happened. Include any error messages or toasts shown on screen.

## Device Info

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Device model | e.g. Lenovo Tab M9 |
| Android version | e.g. Android 13 |
| App version / commit | e.g. abc1234 |
| SumUp reader model | e.g. Air Lite |

## Logs

If possible, attach relevant logcat output filtered by these tags:

```
adb logcat -s SumUpPayment SumUpLogin SumUpReader NetworkStatus Screensaver
```

<summary>Logcat output</summary>

```
Paste logs here
```

</details>

## Additional Context

Screenshots, videos, or any other context that might help.
